actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour component id 1633495861 (m_Script guid: 036aa4c6ab8e55144a03e8aefc6e9cca) corresponds to PhoneRingScreen. Field calling_material is set to Material guid 8669b00696550574cb2f5a0480bbc344. Precondition: Phone_Blue has an enabled AudioSource component. At t=0, start audio playback (AudioSource.Play()) so audioSource.isPlaying == true. Expected: During the trigger window, Update() sets Renderer.material to calling_material each frame.

At t=0, stop audio playback on Phone_Blue's AudioSource (AudioSource.Stop()) so audioSource.isPlaying == false. Expected: On the next frame, Update() restores Renderer.material to the original_material cached in Start().
